attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WXSA.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_XAAS_KEY
 ,WXSA.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,WXSA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
 ,WXSA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
 ,WXSA.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY  
 ,WXSA.ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD             
 ,WXSA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,WXSA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
 ,WXSA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
 ,WXSA.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
 ,WXSA.SALES_MOTION_CD               
 ,WXSA.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    
 ,WXSA.SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
 ,WXSA.TRANSACTION_BKG_VERSION_INT   
 ,WXSA.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME         
 ,WXSA.DV_TOPSKU_SOSBR_ITM_SLSTRX_KEY            
 ,WXSA.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
 ,WXSA.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
 ,WXSA.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY        
 ,WXSA.START_TV_DTM                  
 ,WXSA.END_TV_DTM                    
 ,WXSA.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,WXSA.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,WXSA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,WXSA.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
FROM $$WORKDB.W_XAAS_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WXSA
WHERE DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_TV NXSA
WHERE NXSA.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_XAAS_KEY = WXSA.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_XAAS_KEY
AND   NXSA.START_TV_DTM = WXSA.START_TV_DTM
)

SELECT
  NSNA.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_XAAS_KEY
 ,NSNA.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,NSNA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
 ,NSNA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
 ,NSNA.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY  
 ,NSNA.ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD             
 ,NSNA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,NSNA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
 ,NSNA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
 ,NSNA.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
 ,NSNA.SALES_MOTION_CD               
 ,NSNA.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    
 ,NSNA.SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
 ,NSNA.TRANSACTION_BKG_VERSION_INT   
 ,NSNA.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME         
 ,NSNA.DV_TOPSKU_SOSBR_ITM_SLSTRX_KEY           
 ,NSNA.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
 ,NSNA.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
 ,NSNA.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY                          
 ,NSNA.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,NSNA.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,NSNA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,NSNA.EDW_UPDATE_USER    
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_TV NSNA 
WHERE END_TV_DTM='3500/01/01 00:00:00'
